title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT ELECTION OFFICER HOLDS MEETING WITH SUPERVISOR, BLOs & ASST. BLOs OF 36-TUICHAWNG (ST)
content:
175/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 15th June, 2026 :Today at 4:00 PM, Lawngtlai District Election Officer Shri Donny Lalruatsanga held a meeting with the Supervisor, BLOs and Asst. BLOs of 36-Tuichawng (ST) Constituency at the BDO, Chawngte RD Block Office.

Shri Donny Lalruatsanga expressed his appreciation to the Supervisor, BLOs and Asst. BLOs of 36-Tuichawng (ST) for their dedication and urged them to continue working with sincerity and diligence. He highlighted the importance of the ongoing SIR 2026 exercise and advised them to carry out their duties carefully.

He stated that SIR 2026 is being conducted based on the 2005 SIR and while ensuring that all genuine citizens of India are included, utmost care must be taken to prevent the inclusion of ineligible persons. He further encouraged them to work with due diligence.

The DEO informed that the digitization process is scheduled to be completed by 28th June, 2026. After this, the Claims and Objections process will be conducted, followed by the publication of the Final Electoral Roll.

The Booth Level Officers of 36-Tuichawng (ST) Constituency also submitted their digitization reports. It was reported that digitization has been completed by 100% in Kamalanagar-I, 90% in Kamalanagar-II, 85% in Kamalanagar-III and 95% in Kamalanagar-IV.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT ELECTION OFFICER,  IN 36-TUICHAWNG (ST) A SUPERVISOR, BLO & ASST.BLO TE MEETING NEIHPUI
content:
1011/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, the 15th June, 2026 :Vawiin chawhnu dar 4:00 PM khan BDO, Chawngte RD Block Office - ah Lawngtlai District Election Officer Pu Donny Lalruatsanga'n 36-Tuichawng (ST) a Supervisor, BLO leh Asst.BLO - te meeting neihpui.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan 36- Tuichawnga Supervisor, BLO leh Asst. BLO- te thahnemngaihnaah lawmthu a sawi a. SIR 2026 kalpui mek chu a pawimawh hle tih tarlangin, thahnemngai leh fimkhur taka thawk chhunzawm zel turin a chah a. SIR 2026 chu 2005 SIR zulzui a kalpui tur a nih angin,India khua leh tui dik takte an Chuang vek tur a nih laiin, chuanglo turte thunpalh lakah fimkhur a tul hle tiin, uluk taka thawk turin a fuih a. DEO chuan Degitization chu ni 28, June, 2026 a zawh tura tih a ni a, hemi hnu hian 'Claims and Objection' neih leh niin, chumi hnuah 'Final Electoral Roll' tlangzarh tur a nih thu a sawi bawk a ni.

36- Tuichawng (ST) - a  Booth Level Officer-  ten degitization report-  pekna neiin , Kamalanagar I- 100% ; Kamalanagar-II -90%; , Kamalanagar -III - 85% leh Kamalanagar-IV, -95% ah te 'degitization'  tih a nih tawh thu ngaihthlak a ni.

Attachment

title: FOREST MINISTER PU LALTHANSANGA’N YOUNG MIZO ASSOCIATION KHAWHAI BRANCH YMA DAY VAWI 91-NA A HMANPUI
content:
1010/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 15th June, 2026 :Vawiin khan Khawhai Town Hall-ah Young Mizo Association Khawhai Branch chuan YMA Day vawi 91-na an hmang a, Environment, Forest & Climate Change (EF&CC) Minister Pu Lalthansanga chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Pu Lalthansanga chuan, 'Kan ram hian ramdang neih ve loh tlawmngaihna kan nei hi kan vannei hle a, he nun ze mawi tak hi chhawm nung zel turin kan inchah duh a ni. Zin miten kan ram an rawn hre pawh zel a, kan ram sik leh sa leh thing leh mau ringawt te hi hmuhnawm an ti a ni. Kan pipute sulhnu tun thlenga kan la hmuh theihte hi humhalh kawngah tan kan lak a ngai a, thang thar lo awm zel turte tana a pawimawhna kan inzirtir uar zel ka duh a ni’ a ti a. ‘Zirna kawngah hma kan sawn rualin tun aia nasa zawka zirna lamah kan tan zual a ngai hle a ni. Saptawng mai bakah Hindi hi kan zir thiam a pawimawh em em a ni. Hindi hi kan thiam loh chuan kan hun kal zel turah harsatna kan tawk thei a ni. Kan thalaite nun hi kan ven uluk a ngai tawh hle mai a, ruihhlo in nasa takin kan thalaite a run mek a, chhungkua, khawtlang leh ram nasa takin a nghawng avangin he thil hi theihtawpin kan do rual a ngai a ni,’ a ti bawk.

Forest Minister chuan,’YMA hi mi zawng zawng ta a ni a, sawrkar pawh hian ram tana hmasawnna hna a thawh kawngah hian YMA leh NGO pawl hrang hrang te nen inlungrual takin hna a thawk thin a ni. Kan ramah hian pawl hrang hrang, Kohhran hrang hrang leh party pawh chi hrang hrang kan awm a, heng zawng zawng hi hmun khata min phuarkhawmtu chu YMA hi a ni,’ a ti a. ‘Kan ramin hmasawnna hmel thar a hmu zel a, hnathawh tha lo kan hriat chuan sawrkar hotute hnenah hrilh vat turin kan inngen a ni. Sawrkar hna lak kawngah pawh fair taka tlingte chu lak mai an ni a, a hmaa insawipui ang khan awmzia a nei tawh loh avangin thalai hna zawng mekte tan kawl a eng chho zel a ni. Chief Minister taima tak kan nei a, kuthnathawktute tan a theihtawp a chhuah tak meuh meuh a ni. Naupan lai atanga thingtlang lo neia hnathawk a ni a, kan ramin State dangte ruala hma a sawn ve thei h nan rim takin hna a thawk a, a lawmawm em em a ni’ a ti bawk.

He hun hi Pu Thanhnuna, President chuan a kaihruai a, Tv RK Lalramdinpuia, Sec III in hunserh hmangin Pu K Lalrammuana, Secretary chuan report a pe bawk. Hun hi chawhma, chawhnu leh zanah te hman a ni a, section hrang hrang ten item chi hrang hrangin inelna an neih bakah intihhlimna hun an hmang bawk.

title: IPRP&S MINISTER PU B. LALCHHANZOVA'N SIALHAWK NORTH BRANCH YMA DAY VAWI 91-NA A HMANPUI
content:
1009/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 15th June 2026 :Vawiin chawhnu khan Information, Public Relations, Printing & Stationery (IPRP&S) Minister Pu B. lalchhanzova'n YMA Sialhawk North Branch YMA Day vawi 91-na chu Sialhawk YMA Hall-ah khuallian niin a hmanpui.

YMA Day lawmnaah hian khuallian Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan Sialhawk North Branch YMA tan cheng singkhat hlanin thu sawina hun a hmang nghal a. Mizo hnam lo kal tawhna hriatreng nan leh a kal leh zelna tur atan YMA Day lawm thin a ni hi a hlu hle a ni a ti a. Sialhawk khua chu kuthnathawk nasa khua an nih thu sawiin an branch chhunga ruihhlo zuar an awm lo chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Mi tupawh kuthnathawka eizawng emaw zirlai emaw eng mi pawh ni ila khawvelah eng hna mah hi a sang bik leh a hniam bik a awm lo a, kan hma theuha tih tur awm hi tha takin ti ila, dikna leh rinawmna in kan nun kaihruai sela, kan theihna zawn theuha midangte tan malsawmna kan nih a pawimawh a ni, a ti a. Mizote chu kan nihna zahpui lo a, kan nunphung, kan hnam zia, kan hnathawh te chawimawia, kan nihna ang anga kan lan ngam a pawimawh thu sawiin, hmalan pan tura bei zel chungin, kan thlen chin zelah nun hlim leh hahchawl neih a pawimawh thu a sawi a.

Khuallian chuan zirlaite tan fuihna thu sawiin, Mizote hi kan thluak a tha a, kan ram leh kan khuate hmasawnna kawnga thui tak kan thlen theih nan zirna lamah tan kan lak a ngaih thu a sawi a. A bial chhungah zirlai 117 tlawhchhuah program siamin, lehkha zir thei chu an hun tam zawk lehkha zir nan an hman a ngai tiin a fuih thin thu a sawi a. Sialhawk khaw hruaitute pawh an khawchhunga zirlaite chutianga fuih zel turin a chah a.

He YMA Day lawmna inkhawm hi Branch YMA President Pu Lalngaihawma Khiangte chuan a kaihruai a, Branch YMA Secretary hnen atangin report ngaihthlak a ni a. Sialhawk North Branch member hi 570 vel an ni a, nikum leh kumin YMA Day inkarah YMA member boral an awm lo a, an branch huamchhungah ruihhlo zuar an awm loh thu te ngaihthlak a ni. YMA thuthlung sawi rualna neih a ni a, Lalsuamtluanga'n kumpuan thupui sawina neiin, ‘Ziontlang leh van arsi mawi’ tih hla hmanga section inelna neih a ni bawk. Kumin YMA Day thupui atan ‘Ruihhlo do’ tih hman a ni.

title: CHAWNPUI BRANCH YMA DAY LEH LAWMTHU SAWINA HUN PU K. SAPDANGA, UD&PA MINISTER IN A HMANPUI.
content:
1008/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 15th June, 2026 :Chawnpui Branch YMA chuan YMA Day leh Aizawl City area YMA Branch Fai lawmman Pakhatna an dawn lawmna chu June ni 15, 2026 chawhma dar 11 khan an hmang a. Pu K. Sapdanga, UD&PA Minister, Pu TBC Lalvenchhunga, Bialtu MLA & Adviser to CM (Finance) leh Pu PB Lallawmzuala, AMC corporator leh UD&PA Department official ten an hman pui.

Chawnpui Branch YMA hnenah hian kum 2025-26 a UD&PA leh Central YMA buatsaih, Aizawl City Area Branch YMA Fai Inelna ah lawmman pakhatna chu kumin Chapchar Kut ah khan hlan an ni a. He lawmman an dawn leh tun hnai a UD&PA Department hnuaia Chawnpui Veng chhunga hmasawnna hna thawh hrang hrang avanga lawmthu sawina inkhawm an buatsaih a. Chawnpui veng a Sawrkar in hma a lak na te avanga lawmthu sawi na atan veng fai inelna ah hian theih tawp chhuah in, Local Council, NGO, Kohhran hrang hrang leh veng chhunga sikul aiawh te nen Chawnpui Faina Beihpui Komiti an din a. SIPMIU in bawlhhlawh thliarhran (segregation) ah pilot area ah a lo thlan tawh an nih avangin hmalak a nawm thu an sawi a. Veng fai ber lawmman an dawn chu an ngai hlu in an hmalakna a hlawk thlak an tih thu an sawi.

He hun hman pui tu Pu K. Sapdanga chuan Chawnpui veng in hlawhtlinna lawmawm tak an dawn leh sawrkar laka lawmthu sawi nachang an hria chu fakawm a tih thu a sawi a. Veng fai ni zel tura tan la turin a sawm a. Solid Waste Management Rules thar hman turah pawh nasa leh zual a tan la turin a ngen a ni.

Khuallian chuan YMA in a lung a len thu sawi in "Pathian in kan Missionary te kaltlangin kum 90 mei mit lova, a hniam zawng nilova hmasawn zawnga kal zel thei Pawl ropui, hnam dangte neih ve loh pawl, YMA min din sak hi Zofate kan vannei hle a ni" tiin YMA kaltlangin khawtlang rawng bawl zel turin kal khawm te a sawm bawk a ni.

Pu TBC Lalvenchhunga, Bialtu MLA pawhin Khual Zahawm niin he hun hi a hman pui a. Chawnpui veng a sawrkar hmalakna hrang hrang ah veng mipui te an lawm thiam thin zia leh an thil dawn te an phu a tih thu a sawi.

He hunah hian Khuallian leh Khual zahawm te hian YMA Day puala inelna hrang hrang an buatsaih a lawmman te an sem a ni.

Attachment

title: MINISTER PROF. LALNILAWMA'N MUALPHENG YMA RÛN MLA FUND A SAK A HAWNG; MUALPHENG LEH LENCHIM YMA DAY A HMANPUI
content:
1007/2026-2027

Dated June 15th, 2036 :Vawiin khan Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan a bial chhung khaw pahnih - Mualpheng leh Lenchim ah te YMA day a hmanpui. MLA fund cheng nuai 14 hmanga sak Mualpheng Branch YMA Run a hawng a ni.

Minister hian Mualphenga hun a hman zawhin Lenchim Branch YMA Golden Jubillee lung a hawn bakah Jubillee dar vuain YMA Day Programme hman zui a ni.

Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan YMA Day pual thu a sawinaah khawtlang tana YMA hlutna leh hmalakna tangkai tak takte a sawi a. Ruihhlo do kawnga YMA hmalakna chu fakin, 'kan ram leh hnam boral loh nan ruihhlo leh a kaihhnawih lakah YMA member te kan fihlim mai ni lovin, a that loh zia midang zirtirtu kan ni tur a ni', a ti. Minister chuan zirna lama hmasawn zual zel a pawimawh thu a sawi bawk.⁠ Taimak, huaisen leh rinawm hi hlawhtlinna bul a ni, a ti.

YMA in huang lo a neih loh thu Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan sawiin, ruihhlo do kawngah a ni emaw, ram hmasawnna hnathawh kawng ah a ni emaw, midang tanpuina kawng a ni emaw, kawng engkimah YMA hian huang lo a neih loh thu a sawi a. Ram leh hnam humhalh leh siamthatna kawng ah YMA in theihtawp a chhuah thu a sawi bawk.

Lenchim Branch YMA hi kum 1976-a din a ni a,  tunah hian Section pahnih; Khuangchera Section leh Taitesena Section-ah te inṭhenin Member 294 an awm mek.

Attachment

title: MYC CHAIRMAN-IN RAWPUICHHIP YMA DAY LAWMNA HMANPUI
content:
1006/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 15th June, 2026 :Pu Malsawmzuala Ralte, Chairman, Mizoram Youth Commission (MYC) chuan vawiin khan Rawpuichhip YMA Day lawmna Khuallian niin a hmanpui. Rawpuichhip YMA hian kumin YMA day lawmna thupuiah "Ruihhlo Do" tih an hmang a ni.

Khuallian MYC Chairman Pu Malsawmzuala Ralte chuan Sawrkarin ruihhlo do kawngah theihtawp a chhuah thu sawiin, Excise & Narcotics, Police, CID leh SIB te tha taka thawk hovin ruihhlo tihrem kawngah tha an thawh nasa hle a ni, a ti a. Ruihhlo leh a kaihhnawih do kawnga YMA hmalakna fakawm tiin, theihtawp chhuaha Sawrkar tawiawm zel turin a sawm a. Ruihhloin a tihbuai thalaite enkawlna Hulhliap Short Stay Centre, Synod Camping Centre camping chhawng 9 buatsaih a ni tawh tih sawiin, camper 2200 vel an enkawl atanga zaa 30 vel zetin ruihhlo an la nghei chhunzawm zel thu a sawi a. Ruihhlo la ti ve lo naupang leh thalaite venhim a tul thu sawiin, inchhungkhur, sunday school leh school-ahte tichhin lova fihlim tura inzirtir a tul thu a sawi bawk.

Inkhawm hi Pu H. Vanlalzapa, Branch YMA President-in a kaihruai a, Pu HB Lalfakawma, VCP-in thu a sawi bawk.

Attachment

title: MINISTER PROF. LALNILAWMA CHUAN KEIFANG LONEITUTE HNENAH COCOA TIAK A SEM
content:
1005/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 15th June, 2026:Rural Development Minister leh Tawi bialtu MLA ni bawk Prof. Lalnilawma chuan a bial chhunga Keifang loneitute hnenah vawiin khan Keifang VC Hall-ah Cocoa ṭiak a sem.

Keifangah hian Cocoa chingtu chhungkaw 16 an awm mek a, a ṭiakte hi Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan a MLA fund aṭanga a leisak a ni.

Thu sawiin Prof. Lalnilawma chuan sawrkar chuan mitin 'Fairel bel thleng phak' nih tumin theihtawp a chhuah thu a sawi a, 'a sawi chauh ni lo, a tiha tih' a tum zel avangin a sawi tawh chu bawhzui zel a tum thu a sawi. Cocoa tiak an phunte chu a lo puitlin huna mimal tin ten mahni in chhungkhur aṭanga ei zawnna ṭha tak an neih phah ngei a beisei thu a sawi a ni.

Minister chuan kuthnathawka ei zawngte hian dinhmun tha zawk a an din theih nan Sawrkar in theihtawp a chhuah thu sawiin, hmalakna hrang hrang te hi a hlawhtlin theih nan chuan beneficiaries/ partner (kan thawhpui te) an pawimawh thu a sawi a. Heng hmalaknate hi a hlawhtlinna hmuh ngei theih nan kan vaiin thawhhona tha tak hnuaiah, taima tak leh rinawm takin kan thawhho zel a pawimawh a ni, a ti.

Vawiina Cocoa tiak semna hun hi Zo-Troy Agri-Horti Farmer Producer Company Limited leh Kangmual Farmers Association tangkawpa buatsaih a ni a. Keifang chu cocoa chinna atan hmun tha a ni thei dawn em tia enchhinna pilot project a ni.

Attachment

title: SERCHHIP DISTRICT HOSPITAL-AH KHUM 15 AWM THEIHNA TUR MAKESHIFT BUILDING THAR HAWN A NI
content:
1004/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 15thJune 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip District Hospital-a khum 15 awm theihna tur Makeshift Building thar chu hawn a ni. A hawnna inkhawm hi Chief Medical Officer Conference Hall, Serchhip-ah buatsaih niin, Lok Sabaha MP Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha’n khuallian niin a hmanpui a, Serchhip District Deputy Commissioner Pu Paul L. Khuma chu khualzahawm niin, Joint VC Chairman Pu R. Sanghmingthanga'n hun a kaihruai a ni.

Khuallian Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha chuan fund pek chhuah kawngah, ram tana ro tling thilte a ngaih pawimawh thu sawiin, Makeshift Bulding sak nana hmalakna chu thil ngaihhlutawm tak a nih thu a sawi a. Kalphung thar Sawrkarin Department hrang hrangah theihtawp chhuahin tan an lak thu sawiin, 'Health Deparment chu Deparment thang nasa pawl tak an ni' a ti a. Mizoramin Health Minister tha tak kan nei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, MUHCS pawhin ram pawn thlenga ngaihhlut a hlawh thu leh Serchhip District-ah pawh beneficiary 715 vel an awm tawh thu a sawi bawk. Serchhip District chu district hmasawn leh danglam bik nia a hriat thu sawiin DISHA Meeting-a District hrang hrang a tlawh kualnaah pawh 'Serchhip District chu District tam takin Central Scheme implement kawngah pawh an pha lo che u a ni,' a ti a. Kum 1978-a MLA hmeichhia thlang tling thei District, hmeichhe dinhmun chawi sanna kawnga hmahruaitu an nih thu pawh sawiin hma sawn zel turin duhsakna a hlan bawk a ni.

Khualzahawm Serchhip DC Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan Damdawi In khum indaih lohna hian mipuite nunah leh ni tin khawsakna kawngah nasa takin nghawng a neih thu a sawi a.  Sawrkar hruaitu Chief Minister leh Lok Sabha MP ten Serchhip mipuite harsatna hrethiama, Makeshift Bulding sak hlawhtlin a nih theih nana an hmalaknaah lawmthu sawiin, Serchhip Joint VC-ten fund awm sa ni miah lo ata, awma siama mipui tana an pen chhuahna chu fakawm a tih thu a sawi bawk a. Health Department-a thawkte hnenah pawh lawmthu sawiin, mipuite'n an chhawr nghal theih tura hma la zui (activate) nghal turin a ngen nghal bawk a. Kalkhawmte chu mi dangte tana malsawmna ni tura fuihin, peih chin baka ke pen luih hram hramna hian hmasawnna nasa zawk a thlen thin tih hre renga, theihtawp chhuah zel turin a chah bawk.

District Medical Superintendent Dr. ZD Lalmuanawma pawhin thu sawiin Joint VC Secretary Lalrinmawia Khiangte hnen atangin ngaihthlak a ni a. Tarlan a nih danin building zau zawng (area) hi 28ft x 33ft a ni a, floor tile phah niin 1st floor-ah toilet European 2 leh Indian 3 dah niin 2nd floor-ah European 1 leh Indian 3 dah a ni bawk.

Chief Minister hmalakna kaltlangin NEDFi CSR atangin cheng nuai 17.3 leh MP Fund atangin cheng nuai 20 hmuh a ni a; he building sak hna thawktu Joint VC te hian sum hman bang awm ang angte chu CM Relief Fund-ah an chhunluh leh vek tur thu an sawi bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: Mizoram Governor Conveys Greetings to YMA on Its 91st Foundation Day
content:
174/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 15th June, 2026:Mizoram Governor, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd), has extended warm greetings to the Young Mizo Association (YMA) and all its members on the 91st Foundation Day.

Describing YMA as the largest socio-cultural and voluntary organisation in Mizoram, the Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh said that since its inception, the organisation has been at the forefront of community service. He commended YMA for its consistent efforts in helping the needy, preserving and promoting Mizo culture, tradition and heritage, and for providing valuable support to the Government in successfully implementing various initiatives with wide outreach.

On this occasion, the Governor called upon the people of Mizoram to uphold the cherished Mizo value of Tlawmngaihna - the spirit of selflessness, compassion and voluntary service - in all their actions. He also appealed to the people to promote unity among different sections of society, respect our elders, remain rooted in our rich cultural heritage, stay away from drugs and substance abuse, and strengthen the collective fight against this menace, particularly to secure a bright future for the youth.

The Governor expressed confidence that YMA will continue to work in close cooperation with the Government and various sections of society for the progress and welfare of the people of Mizoram and the nation.

Attachment

title: Mizoram Larsap-in YMA Day vawi 91-na pualin duhsakna hlan
content:
1003/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 15th June, 2026:Mizoram Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) chuan Young Mizo Association (YMA) dinchamphaphak vawi 91-na pualin YMA leh pawl member zawng zawngte duhsakna a hlan.

Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan YMA chu khawtlang, hnam ziarang leh nunphung chawilar leh tihhmasawn kawnga Mizorama tlawmngai pawl lian ber a nih thu sawiin, din a nih atanga vawiin ni thlengin midangte rawngbawl sak kawngah a khaipa ber a ni, a ti. Tanpui ngaite tanpui, Mizo hnam ziarang, nunphung leh rohlu chhawmnun leh chawilar kawngah YMA-in theihtawp a chhuah leh Sawrkar hmalaknate a hlawhtlin theih nan leh zau zawk a thlen theih nana tha taka a tawiawm thin chu fakawm tiin, chhawmnung zel turin a chah a ni.

Larsap chuan YMA Day pualin Mizo mipuite chu an thil tihna apiangah Tlawmngaihna lantir thin tura chahin, mahni inphata, lainatna leh midang tana inpekna nunpui tlat turin a sawm a. Hnam bil hrang hrang inkara inunauna chawilar turte, aia upa zah tur leh mahni hnam tobul nghet taka vuan turte, ruihhlo leh a kaihhnawih laka inthiar fihlim tur leh thalaite hmakhua ngaia theihtawp chhuaha tangruala do let turin a chah a ni.

Larsap chuan Mizoram mipui leh ram pum hamthat nan YMA chuan Sawrkar leh khawtlang huap pawl dangte nen tha taka hma an lak ho zel a beisei thu sawiin, YMA kalzelna turah duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Attachment
